metadata.title: Replace ApplyPatch Tool
metadata.description: Replace this project’s existing ApplyPatch tool with a more complete apply_patch implementation, including related editing lifecycle mechanisms.

phase.name: Characterize current behavior and add regression tests

task.name: Locate current ApplyPatch tests and project test command
task.description: Find existing test conventions and the minimal command for ApplyPatch/tool logic tests.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Relevant test files or test locations are identified.
A minimal targeted test command is documented in task notes or final summary.

task.name: Add parser and output compatibility tests
task.description: Add failing tests for structured patch envelope, operations, retained unified diff, and new metadata fields.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tests cover Add/Update/Delete/Move parsing expectations.
Tests assert successful output keeps diff and includes structured metadata.

task.name: Add safety and matcher behavior tests
task.description: Add failing tests for named anchors, match modes, ambiguous failures, stale hunk diagnostics, and file operation guards.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tests cover true named anchors and consecutive anchors.
Tests cover exact, anchored_exact, normalized, fuzzy, and ambiguous failure behavior.
Tests cover add-existing, move-existing, duplicate path, missing path, and directory guards.

task.name: Replace parser and patch model
task.description: Introduce operation/hunk/anchor/match-mode model and strict parser behavior in ApplyPatch Logic.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Patch envelope validation rejects malformed or empty patches.
Update hunks store ordered anchors and hunk body lines.
Patch paths continue using this project's path resolution semantics.

task.name: Implement anchor-aware match ladder
task.description: Implement exact, anchored_exact, normalized, and fuzzy hunk matching with fail-closed ambiguity handling.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Named anchors affect hunk placement.
Normalized/fuzzy matching only applies when candidate location is unique.
Failures include actionable hunk diagnostics.

task.name: Implement staged writes and operation guards
task.description: Build a staged write/delete plan with add/update/delete/move guards before filesystem mutation.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Existing add targets and existing move destinations are rejected.
Missing update/delete targets and directory targets are rejected.
Duplicate resolved paths in one patch are rejected.

phase.name: Integrate permissions, freshness, output, and prompts

task.name: Preserve permission governance and add freshness/context refresh integration
task.description: Ensure all touched paths go through current permission flow; connect read freshness/cache invalidation if available, otherwise provide refresh hints.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Permission denial prevents any mutation.
Successful output includes context_refresh_hint for touched files.
If a read cache hook exists, writes validate/invalidate it; otherwise the limitation is recorded.

task.name: Return compatible diff plus structured metadata
task.description: Extend success/failure payloads to keep old diff compatibility and add metadata.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Success includes message, diff, ok, touched files, counts, absolute paths, and match_modes_used.
Failure includes structured error/detail/suggestions and hunk recovery information where relevant.

task.name: Update ApplyPatch tool prompt and coding guidance
task.description: Update Tool.detail/brief or related prompt assets to document patch-first editing, named anchors, small hunks, and retry guidance.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tool detail documents supported directives and hunk line prefixes.
Tool guidance recommends named anchors and reread-on-failure recovery.
Guidance discourages shell-simulated text editing for ordinary edits.

task.name: Run targeted ApplyPatch tests
task.description: Run the minimal relevant test suite for ApplyPatch and adjacent file editing helpers.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Targeted tests pass.
Any unsupported freshness limitation is explicitly documented in summary or code comments.

task.name: Run neighboring verification
task.description: Run neighboring tool/prompt tests or type checks needed to ensure registration and prompt assets remain valid.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Neighboring verification passes or any unrelated failure is documented with evidence.
